heat-metal::choice_or_mode.issue: Heat Metal targets a manufactured metal object, specifically including metal weapons and Heavy or Medium metal armor, but runtime only records generic objects.
heat-metal::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add manufactured metal object target fields with example categories weapon and Heavy/Medium metal armor.
heat-metal::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectFilter material metal, manufactured true, category weapon_or_heavy_medium_armor.

heat-metal::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The damage is represented and repeat damage now has Bonus Action cost, but the post-damage Constitution save, forced drop if possible, and disadvantage on attacks/ability checks until start of caster's next turn are prose-only utility data.
heat-metal::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add post-damage rider fields for holder/wearer save, drop object if possible, and attack/ability-check disadvantage duration.
heat-metal::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime postDamageRider data for Constitution save, dropObject, and disadvantage if not dropped.

heat-metal::vision_light_sound.issue: The object glowing red-hot is presentation for the heated-object damage unless future visual-state work decides to model it.
heat-metal::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No light/vision field required for this descriptive glow in this pass.
heat-metal::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime light/vision field required for this descriptive glow in this pass.

heat-metal::environmental_change.issue: Any creature in physical contact with the heated object takes damage, but physical-contact targeting is not first-class.
heat-metal::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime contactCondition data for creatures in physical contact with the heated object.

heat-metal::conditional_ending.closureReason: Added a caster Bonus Action grantedAction linked to the repeat heat damage effect, added target_object_within_spell_range as a granted-action prerequisite, and changed the repeat damage trigger to on_granted_action. Conditional Ending remains not_applicable because this row was a repeat-action prerequisite gap, not an early-ending rule.
heat-metal::conditional_ending.issue: The repeat Bonus Action damage only works if the object is still within range, but range recheck is prose-only.
heat-metal::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain/repeat action prerequisites for target object still within range.

hold-person::choice_or_mode.issue: The phrase 'Choose a Humanoid' is ordinary target selection, not a mode choice.

hold-person::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Wisdom save negating Paralyzed is represented, and structured Save Outcome is now normalized to negates_condition.

hold-person::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: Hold Person's higher-level casting adds one Humanoid target per slot level above 2, but runtime target count remains fixed at 1 and target scaling is prose-like effect scaling.
hold-person::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-count scaling fields for +1 target per slot level above base.
hold-person::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetScaling data for +1 Humanoid target per slot above 2.

hold-person::repeat_save_or_recurring_ch.issue: The end-of-turn Wisdom repeat save ending the spell on success is represented.

hold-person::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched line-of-sight target selection, not a distinct vision/light/sound mechanic.

hold-person::status_or_state_change.issue: The Paralyzed condition is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION with duration and repeat save.
hold-person::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No status field change required for this reviewed row.
hold-person::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by preserving Paralyzed and removing the stale escape-check placeholder.

invisibility::attack_or_save_modifier.closedReason: This row was a duplicate view of Invisibility's early-ending triggers, not an attack/save modifier. The target_makes_attack_roll, target_deals_damage, and target_casts_spell triggers are now typed under Conditional Ending fields and runtime conditionalEndings.
invisibility::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Invisibility ends after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell; runtime description now includes all three triggers, but they are not typed conditional-ending events.
invisibility::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add early-ending trigger fields for attack roll, damage dealt, and spell cast.
invisibility::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endTriggers data for attack_roll_made, damage_dealt, and spell_cast by the target.

invisibility::vision_light_sound.issue: The Invisible condition itself is represented as a status condition; this bucket does not need separate light/vision emission data.

invisibility::status_or_state_change.issue: The touched creature gaining Invisible is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect.
invisibility::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No status field change required for this reviewed row.

invisibility::conditional_ending.closedReason: Invisibility now records all three early-ending triggers in structured markdown and runtime conditionalEndings: target_makes_attack_roll, target_deals_damage, and target_casts_spell. Higher-slot target-count scaling was already closed in the separate manual_slot_scaled_targets row.
invisibility::conditional_ending.issue: The early-ending triggers and higher-slot target count are still prose/scaling notes rather than first-class runtime fields.
invisibility::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending event fields and target-count scaling fields.
invisibility::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endTriggers and targetScaling +1 creature per slot above 2.

knock::choice_or_mode.issue: The phrase 'Choose an object' is ordinary target selection, not a separate mode choice.

knock::forced_movement.issue: The detector matched the word 'emanates' in the sound text; Knock has no forced movement mechanic.

knock::vision_light_sound.issue: Knock's loud target-object sound is now represented by structured sound fields and runtime soundEmission data.
knock::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Sound Audible Radius 300 feet, Sound Source target_object, and Sound Trigger on_cast.
knock::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding soundEmission with audibleRadius 300 feet to the runtime effect.

knock::created_object_or_structure.issue: Knock unlocks, unsticks, or unbars one access-preventing mechanism and suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 minutes, but these object/access state changes are prose-only.
knock::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: Add lock/access state fields for mundane unlock/unstick/unbar, one-lock limit, and Arcane Lock suppression duration.
knock::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime accessControl data for object categories, one mechanism affected, and Arcane Lock suppression 10 minutes.

knock::conditional_ending.issue: Arcane Lock suppression lasts 10 minutes while the spell itself is instantaneous; that temporary suppression duration is not modeled.
knock::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary suppression duration fields for other spell/effect suppression.
knock::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime suppressesEffect data for Arcane Lock with duration 10 minutes.

lesser-restoration::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched Blinded/Deafened condition names; this is condition removal, not a standalone light/sound mechanic.
lesser-restoration::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Track through runtime condition-removal data once available.

lesser-restoration::status_or_state_chan.issue: Lesser Restoration ends one condition chosen from Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, or Poisoned, but runtime stores this as a generic utility description.
lesser-restoration::status_or_state_chan.recommendedTemplateChange: Add condition-removal fields for one-of listed removable conditions.
lesser-restoration::status_or_state_chan.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionRemoval data with maxRemoved 1 and options Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, Poisoned.

levitate::choice_or_mode.issue: The phrase 'of your choice' is standard target selection, not a separate mode choice.

levitate::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save applies only to unwilling creatures, but runtime save data does not encode that target-state condition.
levitate::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-applies-to fields for unwilling creature targets.
levitate::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAppliesTo unwilling_creature while objects and willing creatures are unaffected by the save.

levitate::movement_or_repositioning.issue: Levitate raises and suspends a creature or loose object and later changes altitude by up to 20 feet, but the current movement model has no vertical suspension/altitude-change type and is forced to use teleport.
levitate::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedTemplateChange: Add vertical levitation/suspension movement fields, altitude delta, actor-specific action cost, and max object weight.
levitate::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime levitation data for vertical rise 20 feet, suspended duration, altitude adjustment 20 feet, and 500-pound object limit.

levitate::forced_movement.issue: The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach, as if climbing; this movement restriction is prose-only.
levitate::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement restriction fields for requires fixed surface/object within reach and climb-like movement.
levitate::forced_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementRestriction data for levitated targets.

levitate::terrain_or_surface.issue: Fixed objects or surfaces within reach determine whether a levitated target can self-move, but terrain/surface dependency is not represented.
levitate::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface dependency fields for movement constraints.
levitate::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceDependency data for fixed object/surface within reach.

levitate::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched line-of-sight target selection, not a vision/light/sound mechanic.

levitate::created_object_or_structure.issue: The detector matched object/surface prose, but Levitate does not create an object or structure.

levitate::conditional_ending.closedReason: This is not an early-ending trigger. The target floating gently to the ground happens after normal spell end and remains open under levitate::aftermath_or_memory, so this duplicate conditional-ending bucket is closed without changing spell data.
levitate::conditional_ending.issue: When the spell ends, an aloft target floats gently to the ground; this end-of-spell descent is not modeled.
levitate::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add end-of-spell aftermath fields for gentle descent when aloft.

levitate::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The gentle float to the ground after the spell ends is an aftermath behavior rather than ordinary duration text.
levitate::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath behavior fields for movement effects.
levitate::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath data matching the conditional-ending finding.

locate-animals-or-plants::social_or_know.issue: Locate Animals or Plants returns direction and distance to the closest matching Beast, Plant creature, or nonmagical plant within 5 miles, but target category options, closest-match selection, and if-present result semantics are prose-only.
locate-animals-or-plants::social_or_know.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detection query fields for named/described kind, allowed categories, search radius, closest result, direction payload, distance payload, and absent-result behavior.
locate-animals-or-plants::social_or_know.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detectionQuery data for Beast, Plant creature, or nonmagical plant within 5 miles.

locate-animals-or-plants::environmental_.issue: The detector matched plant/nature wording, but the spell only provides location knowledge and changes no environment.

locate-object::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched the 'seen it up close' familiarity prerequisite, not a vision/light/sound effect.
locate-object::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Track this through detection prerequisite fields.
locate-object::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Track this through runtime detectionQuery prerequisite data.

locate-object::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: Locate Object can locate a familiar specific object or nearest object of a kind, gives direction to location and movement direction if moving, and is blocked by any lead; runtime keeps this as prose.
locate-object::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object detection query fields for specific familiar object, kind/category search, 1000-foot radius, direction payload, movement direction payload, and lead blocker.
locate-object::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detectionQuery data for object search modes, output payloads, and lead-blocked direct path.

magic-mouth::choice_or_mode.issue: Magic Mouth lets the caster choose whether the spell ends after one delivery or remains to repeat on future triggers; runtime currently says it ends after speaking.
magic-mouth::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery persistence mode fields for end_after_delivery versus repeat_on_trigger.
magic-mouth::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatMode data for one-shot or repeating trigger behavior.

magic-mouth::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: Magic Mouth targets an object that is not being worn or carried by another creature, but runtime target eligibility is generic objects.
magic-mouth::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by object-eligibility propagation: structured markdown now records object worn/carried, magical status, fixed-to-surface, size, weight, and weight-scaling fields.
magic-mouth::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by object-eligibility propagation: targeting.filter.objectEligibility now carries the matching runtime facts.
magic-mouth::target_filter_or_eligibilit.reviewerNote: Closed because this target-filter finding is fully represented by the new objectEligibility fields; mixed target-mode and environmental object-effect findings remain open.

magic-mouth::vision_light_sound.issue: The trigger must be based on visual or audible conditions within 30 feet of the object, but runtime has a generic on_enter_area trigger.
magic-mouth::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trigger sense fields for visual/audible condition types and trigger sensing radius.
magic-mouth::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime triggerCondition data with allowedSenses visual/audible and radius 30 feet.

magic-mouth::message_or_communication.issue: Magic Mouth stores a spoken message of up to 25 words, can deliver it over up to 10 minutes, uses the caster's voice and spoken volume, and may use an existing mouth-like feature; runtime only has summary prose.
magic-mouth::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add stored message fields for max words, max delivery duration, voice/volume preservation, mouth appearance, and object-mouth anchoring.
magic-mouth::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime storedMessage data for word limit, delivery duration, voice, volume, and mouth placement.

magic-mouth::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Magic Mouth is a triggered object enchantment with freely specified visual/audible trigger conditions and repeat/one-shot behavior, but trigger details are flattened.
magic-mouth::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/trigger fields for arbitrary trigger condition text, sensory basis, radius, repeat behavior, and delivery action.
magic-mouth::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger data instead of a single on_enter_area trigger.

magic-mouth::environmental_change.issue: Implanting the message is a triggered communication enchantment, not a broader environmental change.
magic-mouth::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No environmental-change field required beyond trigger/message fields.

magic-weapon::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Magic Weapon gives a +1/+2/+3 bonus to weapon attack and damage rolls by slot tier, but runtime stores the attack/damage bonus as prose.
magic-weapon::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add weapon attack/damage bonus fields with tiered slot scaling.
magic-weapon::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime weaponEnhancement data for magic weapon state and attack/damage bonus: +1 base, +2 at slot 3-5, +3 at slot 6+.

magic-weapon::conditional_ending.issue: Magic Weapon's end-on-recast rule is now represented by Conditional Ending Triggers and runtime conditionalEndings.
magic-weapon::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Conditional Ending Triggers end_on_recast with scope spell.
magic-weapon::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime conditionalEndings carrying end_on_recast for the spell.

melfs-acid-arrow::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: Melf's Acid Arrow has hit, miss, and delayed-hit-only damage branches; runtime has initial hit damage and delayed damage, but miss half-damage and the delayed damage's hit dependency are prose-only.
melfs-acid-arrow::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attack outcome branch fields for hit damage, miss half initial damage only, and delayed damage only if hit.
melfs-acid-arrow::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackOutcome data with missHalfInitialNoDelayed and delayedDamage.requiresInitialHit.

melfs-acid-arrow::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched the arrow/burst prose, but the spell has no ward, alarm, or delayed trigger beyond its hit-gated damage branch.

melfs-acid-arrow::deferred_descriptive_f.issue: The shimmering green arrow and spray of acid are visual presentation for the ranged spell attack and acid damage.
melfs-acid-arrow::deferred_descriptive_f.recommendedTemplateChange: No descriptive visual field required in this goal.
melfs-acid-arrow::deferred_descriptive_f.recommendedJsonChange: No descriptive visual runtime field required in this goal.

mind-spike::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Mind Spike's Wisdom save for half Psychic damage and +1d8 slot scaling are represented; runtime range was corrected to 120 feet.
mind-spike::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No damage/save field change required for this reviewed row.
mind-spike::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by preserving the Wisdom save half damage and correcting targeting range to 120 feet.

mind-spike::vision_light_sound.issue: While the caster has location knowledge, the target cannot become hidden from the caster and gains no benefit from Invisible against the caster; these visibility/stealth overrides are prose-only.
mind-spike::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visibility/stealth override fields for cannot hide from caster and Invisible condition grants no benefit against caster.
mind-spike::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime visibilityOverride data tied to the failed-save tracking rider.

mind-spike::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The location tracking works only while caster and target are on the same plane of existence, but same-plane gating is not first-class.
mind-spike::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar prerequisite fields for ongoing detection/knowledge effects.
mind-spike::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime samePlaneRequired true for the location-tracking rider.

mind-spike::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: On a failed save, the caster always knows the target's location until the spell ends, subject to same-plane gating; runtime has a utility rider but lacks typed tracking payload and visibility overrides.
mind-spike::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add location tracking knowledge fields for failed-save riders, duration, target identity, and same-plane requirement.
mind-spike::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime tracking data for alwaysKnowLocation plus samePlaneRequired and hidden/invisible overrides.

mind-spike::status_or_state_change.issue: Mind Spike does not apply a named condition, but it creates a caster-specific state where hidden/invisible benefits are suppressed against the caster.
mind-spike::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add caster-specific visibility state fields separate from named conditions.
mind-spike::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime casterSpecificState data for noHiddenFromCaster and invisibleNoBenefitAgainstCaster.

mind-spike::conditional_ending.issue: The tracking rider lasts until the spell ends but is only useful while both creatures are on the same plane; the same-plane limit is not modeled as an ongoing condition.
mind-spike::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ongoing-condition fields for same-plane gating on duration-bound knowledge effects.
mind-spike::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ongoingCondition samePlaneRequired for the tracking rider.

mirror-image::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Mirror Image redirects hits using a d6 roll for each remaining duplicate, but runtime still has only a corrected prose description and no interception model.
mirror-image::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defensive duplicate interception fields for trigger on hit, dice per remaining duplicate, success threshold, redirect target, and duplicate destruction.
mirror-image::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime duplicateInterception data: base duplicates 3, roll d6 per duplicate, any 3+ redirects hit to one duplicate.

mirror-image::vision_light_sound.issue: Creatures with Blinded, Blindsight, or Truesight are unaffected, but these perception exceptions are only prose.
mirror-image::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add perception exception fields for defensive/illusion effects.
mirror-image::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime perceptionException data for Blinded, Blindsight, and Truesight.

mirror-image::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The spell creates three duplicates in the caster's space that move with the caster and mimic actions, but duplicate count, following, mimicry, and indistinguishability are not structured.
mirror-image::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion duplicate fields for count, location, follows caster, mimics actions, and indistinguishable behavior.

mirror-image::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: Duplicates are destroyed only by redirected hits and ignore all other damage/effects; the spell ends when all three are destroyed. Runtime has no duplicate object state.
mirror-image::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedTemplateChange: Add duplicate lifecycle fields for destruction trigger, immunity to other damage/effects, remaining count, and ends_when_all_destroyed.

mirror-image::status_or_state_change.issue: Blinded is only an attacker exception to the illusion, not a status applied by Mirror Image.

mirror-image::conditional_ending.issue: The spell ends when all three duplicates are destroyed, but that duplicate-count ending is prose-only.
mirror-image::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields based on duplicate/object count reaching zero.
mirror-image::conditional_ending.closedReason: Reused the all_target_instances_expended conditional-ending trigger added for limited spell instances, recorded it in the structured spell fields, and mapped it to the runtime utility effect with spell scope.

misty-step::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Misty Step requires the destination to be an unoccupied space the caster can see, but runtime movement lacks destination occupancy and visibility fields.
misty-step::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination fields for unoccupied and visible requirements.
misty-step::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportDestination requiresUnoccupied true and requiresSight true.

misty-step::vision_light_sound.issue: The brief silvery mist is descriptive presentation for the teleport and is intentionally deferred as flavor.
misty-step::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No visual effect field required for the mist in this pass.
misty-step::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime visual effect field required for the mist in this pass.
